Global (All).title: Concerns over US and Saudi diplomatic row escalate
Global (All).summary: The diplomatic row between the US and Saudi Arabia continues to escalate, with concerns over oil supplies and regional stability growing.

Global (All).title: Rise of Anti-Government Protests in Iran
Global (All).summary: Protests against the Iranian government have been growing in recent days, with reports of clashes between security forces and demonstrators.

Global (All).title: Cyberattack on major healthcare organizations in the US
Global (All).summary: Multiple major healthcare organizations in the US have been targeted in a significant cyberattack, with reports suggesting stolen sensitive patient data.

United States.summary: Protests erupt after the overturn of Roe v. Wade in the US
Violent clashes between police and far-right groups in Portland, Oregon
Gunman opens fire at a mall in Alabama, injuring multiple people

South Korea.title: North Korea's Kim Jong Un makes first public appearance since July 2022 hospitalization
South Korea.summary: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un has appeared in public for the first time in nearly a year, attending a ruling party meeting where he vowed to speed up military modernization, state media reported on July 17, 2023, raising concerns about regional tensions.

South Korea.title: South Korea's Yoon calls for stronger deterrence against North Korea
South Korea.summary: South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol has called for a stronger military deterrence against North Korea on July 11, 2023, amid rising tensions in the region, warning Beijing against supporting Pyongyang.

South Korea.title: South Korean President Yoon says Seoul to acquire F-35 fighter jets to counter North Korea
South Korea.summary: South Korea's President Yoon Suk-yeol has announced plans to acquire F-35 fighter jets to counter the military threat from North Korea on June 28, 2023, amid growing tensions in the region.

Japan.title: Japan Arrests 3 Over Leak of State Secrets
Japan.summary: Japan has arrested 3 men suspected of leaking classified information linked to Ukraine, the latest move in a series of cases involving state secrets.

Japan.title: Japan's Nikkei Falls to 28-Month Lows Due to Rising Global Tensions
Japan.summary: Japan's benchmark Nikkei index fell to its lowest level in 28 months as investors grew increasingly wary of rising global tensions, particularly in relation to Ukraine.

Japan.title: Japan Sees Record 2,000 COVID-19 Cases as Omicron Wave Continues
Japan.summary: Japan reported a record 2,000 COVID-19 cases on 13th July as the Omicron wave continues, raising concerns about hospital capacity.
